template: Evidence consolidation — restructured 625-line ledger into clean 250-line synthesis
key_finding: Research program complete — all core questions from research_spec.md addressed. Ledger restructured from 625 messy lines to ~250 clean lines with narrative synthesis. 18 genuinely open questions identified from 114+ accumulated.
evidence_impact: No new evidence — consolidation of existing findings into definitive form for review and potential write-up
next_planned: Potential: (1) Write-up/technical report, (2) Targeted experiments on high-priority open questions (K-only PGD on MHA, positional dissociation replication on Llama), (3) TC-aware compression benchmark

null_space_existence.status: CONFIRMED in K-space (p=0.013). Narrow but real. Qwen-specific.

spatial_structure.status: DECISIVELY DISCONFIRMED for selectivity. Positional dissociation confirmed.

positional_dissociation.status: STRONG and universal. Late=answer (59x ratio), early=infrastructure.

geometric_dissociation.status: K > V UNIVERSAL under direction perturbation: 5/5 models, 15 independent conditions.

natural_usage.status: H2O/TC protection via position. TC best protection metric.

cross_model_replication.status: COMPLETE: 4 families, 5 training variants, GQA + MHA, Base + Instruct.

encoding_strategy.status: COMPLETE TAXONOMY: Qwen-Base=DIGITAL, Qwen-Instruct=MIXED, Llama/Phi/Mistral=ANALOG. Digital=Qwen-specific.

superadditive_interaction.status: MECHANISM CONFIRMED: analog→strong superadditivity (K-V overlap), digital→weak (staggered cliffs).

literature_convergence.status: DECISIVE: 5+ independent angles (architecture, behavior, safety, computation, mechanistic).

null_space_kv_unification.status: ESTABLISHED: K-only 6/56 vs V-only 0/57 (p=0.013). V-only failure survives max-effort optimization.

disruption_vs_redirection.status: V=disruption only, K=redirection capable. Quality distinction holds.

mha_vs_gqa.status: K > V holds on MHA (Phi) identically to GQA. Confound eliminated.

base_vs_instruct.status: K > V holds on both. Digital V→analog conversion by instruction tuning. K digital preserved.

k_v_universality.status: RESOLVED: Universal under direction (5/5). 4/5 under magnitude (Mistral K≈V is magnitude-specific).
